title: The Hound of the Baskervilles
author: Arthur Conan Doyle
description: ‘The Hound of the Baskervilles’ is the detective work of ‘Sir Arthur Conan Doyle’. He has maintained suspense from the beginning of the story till the end of it. The introduction of the main characters in the story is so remarkable that they do not bore the readers throughout the story. Sherlock Holmes is a detective and Dr. Watson is a person who assists him in the detective adventures. In the story, Sir Charles’ death creates suspense for everyone. subjects: British and irish fiction (fictional works by one author)
